_meta.author: Claude (Adam-supervised, autopilot local cron, 2050 batch)
_meta.note: VA LOCAL 5-pack — closing out Spotsylvania School Board (Lieberman = 7th-and-final SB seat) + Spotsy Commonwealth's Attorney (Mehaffey) + opening Stafford County BoS 7-seat (Vanuch Rock Hill, English Hartwood, Diggs GW Chair). KEY FINDINGS: (1) Lieberman — true non-aligned independent who refused all endorsement meetings in writing; sworn ~Dec 11 2025 alongside Craig-Ford + DiBella; iVoterGuide DECLINED-ALL (no values commitments on record); declared 2 sons in SCPS (one deaf/legally blind/disabled — drives his SPED advocacy); 4-year term 1/2026-12/2029; HARD TRUE family_child_sovereignty q0 (school-choice 'allow state education dollars to follow the child') and q1 (parental rights / full medical/school records access); SOFT TRUE economic_stewardship q2 (mixed-direction — proposed 'super Courtland' to eliminate $154M new-HS cost AND voted YES on $237.2M bond); SOFT TRUE refuse_state_overreach q0/q3 (Policy BHA-R 'I'm not so sure this wasn't done intentionally to slip it past us' joining DiBella's failed 4-3 motion to table; board-vs-supt-Mitchell transparency stance); SOFT TRUE public_justice q0 (campaigned on FBI Rap Back + drug-testing both rejected by Mitchell admin); religion NULL (no public faith statement); pre-period: Nov 7 2025 Shamgar Connors no-trespass order + Nov 10 2025 gun-free-zone restoration BOTH predate his swearing-in → NULL not FALSE; PARTY FIX Unknown→I (cleanest true-independent in the 7-seat). (2) Mehaffey — Spotsy Commonwealth's Attorney since Jan 1 2024 (4-yr term ends 12/31/2027); succeeded Travis Bird (R, who beat 28-yr incumbent Bill Neely in 2015); HARD TRUE self_defense q0 + q1 + refuse_state_overreach q0 + q1 on his May 15 2026 LETTER to Sheriff Roger Harris refusing to enforce VA SB 727/HB 1524 (public-carry ban) AND SB 749/HB 217 (assault-weapons + 15-rd magazine ban): 'These laws are unconstitutional and cannot be lawfully enforced' — joined ~10-CA VA bloc against the Spanberger administration; Fox News 5/25/2026 direct quote; Gateway Pundit + Daily Caller cite chain; HARD TRUE public_justice q0 (career USMC 2002-08 → 2012 ACA → 2013 Spotsy vice-narcotics → 2022 lead prosecutor 5-defendant Spotsy triple-homicide; explicit prosecutorial-coordination letter to sheriff); SOFT TRUE public_justice q1 (Venable triple-murder 99 years 6/2025, 2024 double-homicide life sentence, Beebout/Fatty's Taphouse 40-yr-minimum ask); HARD TRUE election_integrity q0 (personally obtained 2023 injunction against Nick Ignacio / Fredericksburg Virginia Patriots for misleading sample ballots); HARD TRUE christian_liberty q4 (publicly self-identifies as parishioner at St. Patrick Catholic Church Chancellorsville + Knights of Columbus volunteer per ryanmehaffey.com/about); other cells NULL by discipline. (3) Vanuch — Stafford Rock Hill BoS since Jan 2020 (re-elected Nov 2023 to 1/2024-12/2027 term); former 2021 + 2022 Board Chair (lost chair to Diggs Jan 2025 + 2026); now in the 4D-2R-1I minority after Jan 2026 reorganization; HARD TRUE self_defense q1 (LED the 12/17/2019 Stafford 7-0 2A Sanctuary vote — campaign material + Stafford GOP credit her with leading); HARD TRUE economic_stewardship q2 (FY26 NO on 3¢ tax hike with Bohmke + English; FY27 NO on $0.9675 with Yeung + English — pushed for $0.92, cited 57% homeowner tax burden growth since 2021); HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q0 (12/17/2019 anti-Northam-gun-bill speech; CD-7 platform 'state and local control over COVID-19 policy'); HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q2 (publicly backed Margaret Brent Elementary parents vs mask mandate; CD-7 'CDC/federal overreach' framing); HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q3 (3/19/2025 SUP-for-data-centers in M2 amendment 3-4 lost; 10/2025 won 750-ft setback; 11/27/2025 led letter opposing Dominion's Kraken Loop transmission line); HARD TRUE family_child_sovereignty q2 (9/21/2021 BoS resolution denouncing CRT/1619 + opposing schools requiring pronoun disclosure with funding-clawback threat — she argued the pronouns point on the dais); HARD TRUE biblical_marriage q2 + q4 (same 9/21/2021 anti-pronoun-disclosure vote); HARD TRUE public_justice q0 (voted for 15% pay raise for sheriff's deputies rank 1st Sgt and below; father PWC police officer; husband retired Marine; campaign material explicit 'raised pay for law enforcement and first responders'); SOFT TRUE christian_liberty q0 (MC'd 12/2/2021 Stafford courthouse Christmas tree lighting w/ St. Peter's Lutheran pastor invocation); SOFT TRUE refuse_state_overreach q4 (Jan 29 2025 counseled board to WAIT on dismantling Stafford Diversity Advisory Coalition pending Trump-EO federal-clarity — directional q4 push-back on D-state-driven equity infrastructure). PRIDE PROCLAMATION PATTERN: NULL not FALSE — Vanuch was AWAY FROM DAIS for the 6/3/2025 Stafford Pride 4-1 vote (English NO, Bohmke abstain) and ABSENT ILL for the 6/3/2026 Pride 5-1 vote (English NO); no recorded YES, no recorded NO → cite-only-discipline NULL on biblical_marriage q0. Religion NULL (church not publicly stated). (4) English — Stafford Hartwood BoS since 1/2022 (re-elected Nov 4 2025 against Marcus Oats-D-endorsed-I 4,915-3,141-1,461 in 3-way; 4-yr term 1/2026-12/2029); 44-year career at Stafford SO (still serving, rank First Sergeant); part-time Covenant Funeral Home; member The Mount Church Garrisonville (publicly stated on campaign bio darrellenglishforhartwood.com/about); HARD TRUE biblical_marriage q0 + q4 (SOLE NO vote on Stafford Pride proclamation TWO YEARS running: 6/3/2025 4-1-1 'I think we're going down a slippery slope' and 6/3/2026 5-1 — repeated cited-vote pattern, not single instance); HARD TRUE christian_liberty q4 (publicly identifies The Mount Church Garrisonville as his church on campaign bio); HARD TRUE economic_stewardship q2 (FY26 NO on 3¢ tax hike 'A lot of people have reached out to me, and they can't afford this'; FY27 NO on $0.9675 — one of two pushing for $0.92, 'We are chasing people out of this county who can't pay the tax bill'); HARD TRUE public_justice q0 (44-yr SO career still serving + life member Stafford Rescue Squad + Public Safety Memorial Committee — multi-vector AFFIRMATIVE LE advocacy, high-bar cleared); SOFT TRUE refuse_state_overreach q3 (10/22/2025 YES with majority on 750-ft data-center setback ordinance; campaign moratorium-call 'Do we need them? Yes. Do we need a lot of them? No'). 2A SANCTUARY: 12/17/2019 vote PRE-DATED his Jan 2022 swearing-in → NULL not TRUE on self_defense q1 (correcting any party-default inference). 287(g): Stafford Sheriff Decatur explicitly REJECTED 287(g) ('better served through local policing practices' — Bolts magazine); English has not publicly weighed in either direction → border_immigration q2 NULL. (5) Diggs — Stafford GW District BoS Independent ballot (won 2023 vs incumbent Independent Tom Coen; 4-yr term 1/2024-12/2027); CHAIR Jan 2025 + Jan 2026 reorganizations (5-2 re-elect 2026, NO votes from Allen + Vanuch); active Stafford Sheriff's Office Lieutenant (Special Ops Division) since 2008; VMI BA History (first openly gay cadet/grad) + Liberty MPA 2020 + currently pursuing Liberty Doctorate in CJ Leadership; foster-care survivor (childhood abuse/homelessness/suicide attempt — placed with new family 1999 age 13); viral 'Dancing Deputy' Oct 2016 + America's Got Talent S12 audition 2017 (rejected); openly gay (first openly gay Stafford SO deputy + first openly gay Stafford BoS Chair). HETERODOX HIGH-VALUE: HARD FALSE biblical_marriage q0 (PERSONALLY SPONSORED — Free Press called it 'spurred on by Diggs' — the 6/3/2025 4-1 Stafford Pride proclamation Bohmke-abstaining, then MOVED FORWARD the 6/3/2026 Pride proclamation 5-1; FXBG Free Press front-page 2-year cite chain; HARD on q0 'one-man-one-woman' direction); HARD FALSE economic_stewardship q2 (YES vote 4-3 on FY27 $0.9675 rate, a 4¢ INCREASE from FY26 $0.92, April 29 2026; opponents Yeung/English/Vanuch cited 57% cumulative tax burden growth — Diggs argued for 3 new schools + fire stations + community centers); HARD TRUE public_justice q0 (active Sheriff's Office Lieutenant 15+ years + explicit 'unequivocal support for first responders' campaign framing — multi-vector AFFIRMATIVE LE advocacy, high-bar cleared); SOFT TRUE christian_liberty q3 (as Chair affirmed the December Christmas Tree Lighting Ceremony branding when weather-canceled the in-person event — kept 'Tree Lighting' / Christmas-coded language); SOFT TRUE self_defense q1 (12/17/2019 Stafford 2A Sanctuary 7-0 vote predates his 1/2024 swearing-in BUT as Chair he has NOT moved to rescind → directional inheritance score); NULL on sanctity_of_life, family_child_sovereignty (BoS not SB), election_integrity, border_immigration, refuse_state_overreach q0-q3 (no RGGI/COVID-era/RTA vote on his record). RELIGION NULL (Liberty graduate Christian institution but no personal faith profession). STAFFORD GOP 'TEAM MEMBER' web listing exists at staffordgop.com/team-members/deuntay-diggs but ballot label is Independent — keep party I per ballot per scorecard convention. CROSS-BATCH FY27-STAFFORD PARTITION: Diggs YES + Allen YES + Guy YES + Bohmke-rolled-off-board / Maya Guy + (4th-vote) = the 4-vote majority for the 4¢ hike; the 3 NO votes were Yeung + English + Vanuch — that's the FY27 conservative-restraint fault line cleanly partitioned. RICK-WEST 6TH-CONSECUTIVE-DEFER (continuing escalation): rick-west VA Mayor of Chesapeake R level=local TOP of LOCAL priority queue remains slug-collided with rick-west OK State Rep R level=state (refine-records.py line 366 `by_slug` last-wins). 6th batch to defer (0950+1047+1441+1625 on 2026-06-02 + 1550 + 2050 on 2026-06-04; the 1955+2010 Spotsy 5-packs and 1830 batch did not touch him as they were Spotsy-only); REQUEST RE-ISSUED: rename VA `rick-west` to `rick-west-chesapeake` so engine can target distinctly. Research COMPLETE and stashed since 2026-06-02; would score ~67/100 (HARD FALSE bib_marriage q4 May 2024 first-ever Chesapeake Pride proclamation, FALSE refuse_overreach q2 COVID mask/distance/vax, TRUE econ_q2 9-0 FY24 4¢ RE-tax cut, TRUE pj_q0 LE-pay-raise + Jefferies nomination, TRUE border q2 2017 8-1 anti-sanctuary, TRUE self_defense q1 Dec 2019 unanimous 2A Constitutional City presidency). This is the SIXTH straight cron fire blocked on this top-priority Mayor.

profile.religion: NO PUBLIC EVIDENCE FOUND — no campaign-site or interview-stated denomination or church. Surname has Jewish origin but Lieberman has made no public faith statement either way; cite-only discipline holds this null rather than inferring.
profile.education: NO PUBLIC DISCLOSURE — neither campaign site nor any retrievable source states college credentials.
profile.background: U.S. Army veteran 1982-1989. Owner, Lieberman Insurance Services (1994-present); Owner, Leader In Sports (2002-present). Two sons attended/attend Spotsylvania County Public Schools; one is deaf and legally blind with other disabilities — the personal driver of his special-education advocacy since the 2021 COVID virtual-schooling fight. Mentor in Spotsylvania County Schools (1999-2000); founded mentoring program at Caroline Middle School (2008-09); youth soccer/baseball coach Fredericksburg Parks & Rec (1991-96). Won Nov 4 2025 Spotsylvania SB Lee Hill District 3-way race with 53.86% (3,988 votes) vs. Gabrielle Sulzbach Pickover (D-endorsed) 28.77% (2,130) vs. Todd A. Rump 16.61% (1,230). Predecessor: Lisa Phelps (the prior conservative Lee Hill incumbent who did not seek re-election). Prior 2021 run: lost to Phelps 45.0%-53.9%. Sworn approximately Dec 11 2025 at Stevenson Ridge ceremony alongside Craig-Ford (Battlefield) and DiBella (Berkeley); 4-year term ends Dec 31 2029. SELF-FUNDED + REFUSED ENDORSEMENT MEETINGS IN WRITING: per Free Press 8/4/2025 he 'promised in writing not to meet with any organization that endorses local candidates' — neither Spotsy GOP nor Spotsy Dems nor Rappahannock Conservative Women's Coalition endorsed him; Spotsy Dems endorsed Pickover instead. Genuinely non-aligned — the cleanest true-independent in the Spotsy SB 7-seat.

richard-j-rich-lieberman.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement] Roster verified: Spotsylvania SB Lee Hill District, sworn approximately Dec 11 2025 (Stevenson Ridge ceremony), 4-year term 1/2026-12/2029. PARTY FIX: Unknown → I (true non-aligned independent: refused all endorsement-org meetings in writing; self-funded campaign). RELIGION: not publicly disclosed — null; surname is Jewish-origin but he has made zero public faith statement either way (cite-only discipline). EDUCATION: not publicly disclosed beyond U.S. Army 1982-89. FAMILY: 2 sons in/through SCPS; one deaf and legally blind with other disabilities — drives SPED advocacy. iVOTERGUIDE: profile exists (candidate 88507) but he DECLINED ALL 30+ questions across life/marriage/gender/parental-rights/religion/school-choice/DEI/CRT/2A-armed-faculty/pandemic-mandates/election-integrity (https://ivoterguide.com/candidate/88507/race/23299/election/1312) — leaves every values cell honestly null under cite-only discipline. HARD TRUE family_child_sovereignty q0 (school choice): campaign bio explicitly 'supports allowing state education dollars to follow the child instead of the bureaucracy… public, private, or homeschool' (richforschoolboard.com/about-rich). HARD TRUE family_child_sovereignty q1 (parental notification/consent): campaign bio 'Parents have the fundamental right to raise their child… make decisions about the child's education and healthcare… full and timely access to any and all records, including school and medical records.' SOFT TRUE economic_stewardship q2 (fiscal restraint, mixed direction): proposed converting empty CTE building into 'super Courtland' to ELIMINATE $154M new-high-school cost — capital cost-avoidance direction (FFP 5/19/2026); but simultaneously voted YES on the $237.2M bond referendum (6-0, Rodas absent) saying 'This is how we repair roofs and add classrooms.' Net soft-true on cost-avoidance instinct even when paired with a YES on debt — the avoid-$154M-new-build proposal is the cited TRUE evidence; the bond YES is noted as a same-cell counterweight that holds it SOFT rather than HARD. SOFT TRUE public_justice q0 (publicly backed LE — partial-bar): campaigned on RESTORING the FBI Rap Back continuous-criminal-monitoring program ($100K for school employees) AND mandatory drug-testing-of-employees policy — BOTH of which Supt Mitchell opposed; this is affirmative pro-LE-vetting cross-direction with the D-majority. Doesn't clear the FXBG HARD bar by itself (no joint LE press conference, no explicit pro-deputy statement) but is multi-vector affirmative LE-vetting advocacy → SOFT TRUE. SOFT TRUE refuse_state_overreach q0 (asserted local control vs admin overreach) + SOFT TRUE refuse_state_overreach q3 (subsidiarity / local-board control vs Mitchell admin): May 12 2026 on Policy BHA-R (board-member-school-visits requiring Supt approval): 'I'm not so sure this wasn't done intentionally to slip it past us' — joined DiBella's failed 4-3 motion to TABLE; alleged the policy was altered post-April-20 board review. Procedural/transparency stance against superintendent overreach. PRE-PERIOD: Nov 7 2025 5-0 Shamgar Connors no-trespass order (Nov 12 2025 Potomac Local) AND Nov 10 2025 5-0 gun-free-zone restoration for admin building (FFP 11/11/2025) BOTH predate his Dec 11 2025 swearing-in — both NULL not FALSE on his record (do not score). NOT scored sanctity_of_life q0/q1 (no statement), biblical_marriage q0/q2/q4 (no public position on Pride / SOGI / pronouns / trans-medical / Title IX-sports — declined iVG on all), family_child_sovereignty q2 (no book vote since sworn; declined iVG), christian_liberty q0/q2/q3/q4 (no public faith / invocation / Christian-club / RFRA / Mark-Taylor-lawsuit statement — declined iVG; no religion disclosed), election_integrity q0/q1/q4 (declined iVG), public_justice q1/q2/q3/q4 (no statement beyond LE-vetting q0), refuse_state_overreach q1/q2/q4 (no VDOE-mandate / COVID / unconstitutional-directive statement), border_immigration q1/q2 (N/A SB-tier), self_defense q0/q1 (predecessor pre-period votes only; declined iVG on armed-faculty). Net 2 HARD TRUE + 3 SOFT TRUE on cited cells = ~100% on cited (sparse-data caveat: denominator essentially 5, reflects research diligence on a self-described non-aligned independent who declined iVG-all). Coherent thin-but-honest 'true independent' profile — recommend revisiting after his first FY27 budget vote, the bond referendum follow-through, and any first marriage/SOGI vote. CRITICAL: do NOT infer values-axis TRUEs from his BHA-R procedural alliance with DiBella; they are transparency allies, not stated values allies.

0.note: Campaign bio: 'Supports allowing state education dollars to follow the child instead of the bureaucracy… public, private, or homeschool.' Clean cited self-statement on school choice / ESA direction.

1.note: Campaign bio: 'Parents have the fundamental right to raise their child… make decisions about the child's education and healthcare… full and timely access to any and all records, including school and medical records.' Cited self-statement on parental notification + medical/school records access.

2.note: SOFT TRUE / mixed-direction: proposed converting empty CTE building into 'super Courtland' to ELIMINATE $154M new-high-school cost (capital cost-avoidance, fiscal-restraint instinct). Same article notes he voted YES on the $237.2M bond saying 'This is how we repair roofs and add classrooms' — so SOFT not HARD; the cited evidence is the cost-avoidance proposal, with the bond YES preserved in notes as the counterweight.

0.note: SOFT TRUE: campaigned on restoring the FBI Rap Back continuous-criminal-monitoring program ($100K for school employees) AND mandatory employee drug-testing — BOTH opposed by Supt Mitchell. Affirmative pro-LE-vetting cross-direction with the D-majority. Multi-vector but no joint LE press conference / no explicit pro-deputy statement → soft not hard.

May 12 2026 on Policy BHA-R: 'I'm not so sure this wasn't done intentionally to slip it past us' — joined DiBella's failed 4-3 motion to TABLE; alleged Supt Mitchell altered the policy post-April-20 board review. Local-board-control assertion against superintendent admin overreach.

3.note: Same BHA-R fight: subsidiarity direction on board-versus-administrator authority within the local body (board members' right to access schools without supt-gatekeeping).

profile.religion: Roman Catholic — publicly self-identified parishioner at St. Patrick Catholic Church (Chancellorsville, VA) and Knights of Columbus volunteer (https://ryanmehaffey.com/about/).
profile.education: B.B.A. (summa cum laude) Campbell University (completed during USMC service); J.D. + M.B.A. (3-year program) Mercer University, where he won the school's mock trial competition.
profile.background: U.S. Marine Corps 2002-2008, enlisted at 17 post-9/11. 2005 deployment with 26th MEU aboard USS Kearsarge (survived the Aqaba rocket attack); 2006 deployment with 24th MEU as CH-53 aircrew, supporting the U.S. Embassy Beirut evacuation. Discharged Sergeant. Wife Lucie (high-school sweetheart); four children; 10+ years Spotsylvania resident. Legal career: 2012 Assistant Commonwealth's Attorney, Lancaster County VA; 2013-2023 Spotsylvania ACA (vice-narcotics prosecutor); 2022 lead prosecutor on the 5-defendant Spotsylvania triple-homicide convictions (multiple life sentences). Elected Commonwealth's Attorney Nov 7 2023 as R nominee (98.4% in unopposed general; succeeded Travis D. Bird R, who held the seat 2016-2023 after defeating 28-year incumbent Bill Neely in 2015; Bird endorsed/contributed $125 to Mehaffey's campaign). Sworn Jan 1 2024; 4-year term ends Dec 31 2027.

ryan-mehaffey.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement] Roster verified: Spotsylvania Commonwealth's Attorney, sworn Jan 1 2024, 4-year term ends Dec 31 2027. RELIGION confirmed: parishioner St. Patrick Catholic Chancellorsville + Knights of Columbus volunteer (ryanmehaffey.com/about). EDUCATION: Campbell BBA summa cum laude + Mercer JD/MBA 3-yr. MILITARY: USMC 2002-08, Sergeant; 26th MEU Kearsarge 2005 Aqaba rocket-attack survivor; 24th MEU 2006 CH-53 aircrew Beirut Embassy evacuation. CRITICAL HARD-TRUE EVIDENCE: May 15 2026 PUBLIC LETTER to Spotsylvania Sheriff Roger L. Harris REFUSING to enforce VA SB 727/HB 1524 (public-carry ban) AND SB 749/HB 217 (assault-weapons + 15-rd magazine ban) signed by Gov. Spanberger: 'These laws are unconstitutional and cannot be lawfully enforced' — citing Heller, Bruen, Miller (AR-15 as 'most popular rifle in America'). Joined ~10-CA bloc of Virginia Commonwealth's Attorneys. Confirmed by Fox News 5/25/2026 ('The Second Amendment is the supreme law of the land, both in the U.S. Constitution and the analog in the Virginia Constitution'), Gateway Pundit, Daily Caller, WJLA (joined Warren Co CA John Bell). HARD TRUE self_defense q0 + HARD TRUE self_defense q1 + HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q0 + HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q1 + HARD TRUE public_justice q0 (joint LE-prosecutorial coordination letter). HARD TRUE public_justice q1 (proportional violent-crime consequences): Venable triple-murder 99-year sentence June 2025; 2024 double-homicide of two Latino men life sentence; Beebout/Fatty's Taphouse asked judge for 40-yr minimum (Fredericksburg.com). HARD TRUE election_integrity q0: 2023 personally obtained INJUNCTION against Nick Ignacio + Fredericksburg Virginia Patriots for misleading sample ballots in the SB race (WUSA9 / VA Elections Database) — direct prosecutorial election-integrity action. HARD TRUE christian_liberty q4 (faith identity): publicly self-identifies as St. Patrick Catholic parishioner + Knights of Columbus volunteer on his own campaign about page. NOT scored sanctity_of_life q0/q1 (no abortion-pill prosecution policy public), biblical_marriage q0/q2/q4 (no SOGI/hate-crime prosecutorial policy public), family_child_sovereignty q0/q1/q2 (no library-content / sex-ed prosecution policy public), christian_liberty q0/q2/q3 (no sidewalk-counselor / Christmas-display / Mark-Taylor-lawsuit prosecutorial-policy statement located — Mark Taylor State Police investigation Aug 2024 reportedly produced no criminal charges; charges against former SB Chair Kirk Twigg were VSP/state-level, not announced as Mehaffey's office), economic_stewardship q0/q1/q2 (no published office-budget / asset-forfeiture / declination-data position), election_integrity q1/q4 (no specific paper-ballot / private-grant prosecutorial statement located beyond q0), public_justice q2/q3/q4 (no published bail / charging / public-health-framing policy; no soft-on-crime statement), refuse_state_overreach q2/q3/q4 (no COVID / subsidiarity / unconstitutional-directive statement beyond the 2A defiance which is in q0/q1), border_immigration q1/q2 (Sheriff Harris sets detainer policy; Mehaffey has not publicly weighed in on 287(g) — null not FALSE). Net 7 TRUE / 0 FALSE on cited cells = 100% on cited. Coherent USMC-veteran prosecutor-conservative profile: high-bar HARD on 2A defiance (the strongest publicly-documented prosecutorial 2A push-back in the Spotsy roster), high-bar HARD on violent-crime charging, HARD on election-integrity (the 2023 injunction is unique), HARD on faith identity (Catholic + KofC). Recommend revisiting if he publishes a charging-policy memo, releases declination data, or weighs in on a Mark Taylor / Shamgar Connors / SB-threat prosecutorial decision.

Fox News 5/25/2026 direct quote 'The Second Amendment is the supreme law of the land.' One of ~10-CA bloc.

set.office: County Board of Supervisors — Rock Hill District

profile.religion: NO PUBLIC EVIDENCE FOUND of stated church membership. Closest data point: she MC'd the 12/2/2021 Stafford courthouse Christmas tree lighting at which Pastor Paul Toelke of St. Peter's Lutheran Church (Stafford) gave the invocation (Potomac Local 12/6/2021). She has not publicly named her own church.
profile.education: Magna Cum Laude, Virginia Wesleyan University, B.A. Business.
profile.background: Born 1983 in Prince William County to a 'lower-middle-class family' — father a Marine and PWC police officer (Tennessee Star 5/4/2022). Owner / President / CEO of a healthcare-focused public-affairs / lobbying firm; career in healthcare access advocacy for terminally and chronically ill patients (Stafford official bio; OpenSecrets federal lobbying registry). Husband David is a retired Marine; parents live in Aquia District. First sworn January 2020 (elected Nov 2019, replacing retiring Wendy Maurer); re-elected Nov 7 2023 defeating Democrat Howard M. Rudat 65.7%-34.0%; current term 1/1/2024-12/31/2027. Board Chair in 2021 and 2022. Nominated for Chair Jan 2025 (lost 3-4 to Diggs) and Jan 2026 (lost 5-2 to Diggs); nominated for Vice Chair Jan 2026 (lost 3-4 party-line) — Maya Guy became Vice Chair. Currently a rank-and-file Republican in a 4D-2R-1I board (first Black-majority board in county history per Jan 2026).

set.office: County Board of Supervisors — Hartwood District

profile.religion: Member, The Mount Church (Garrisonville, VA) — publicly stated on campaign bio (darrellenglishforhartwood.com/about). One of the few Stafford BoS members with a directly cited church affiliation.
profile.education: Stafford County Public Schools (Stafford Elementary, Stafford Middle, Drew Middle, Stafford High). No college degree publicly listed.
profile.background: 44-year veteran of Stafford County Sheriff's Office (still serving; rose from patrol officer to First Sergeant). Part-time at Covenant Funeral Home. Life member Stafford Rescue Squad; Sons of American Legion Post 290 (40 years); Area 11 Special Olympics Board; Westlake Architectural Review Board; Fire & Rescue Memorial Committee; two prior terms on the Stafford Planning Commission (Vice Chair 2020). Wife Gina (married 30+ years); two children raised through Stafford schools. First elected Nov 2021 (sworn 1/1/2022); re-elected Nov 4 2025 in a 3-way race over Marcus Oats (D-endorsed I) and Kelly Robertson (I) 4,915-3,141-1,461; current term 1/1/2026-12/31/2029. Rank-and-file Republican in the 4D-2R-1I board configuration following the Jan 2026 reorganization (Chair Diggs, Vice Chair Maya Guy).

set.office: County Board of Supervisors — George Washington District (Chairman)

profile.religion: NO PUBLIC EVIDENCE FOUND of a specific church/congregation. He holds graduate degree(s) from Liberty University (Christian institution) and is currently pursuing a Doctorate in Criminal Justice Leadership at Liberty — but he has made no public statement of personal faith identity, attendance, or denomination. Liberty enrollment alone is not equivalent to a self-stated faith profession.
profile.education: B.A. History (Middle East concentration), Virginia Military Institute (VMI) — publicly identified as the first openly gay cadet/graduate. M.P.A., Liberty University (2020). Currently pursuing a Doctorate in Criminal Justice Leadership at Liberty University. Commissioned U.S. Army Reserves out of VMI.
profile.background: Born 1985 in Wicomico, MD. Endured childhood physical/sexual/mental abuse, homelessness, and an attempted suicide; placed with a new family in 1999 at age 13 — foundation of his nationally-known foster-care advocacy (motivational speaker, author of 'Beneath the Scar' documentary; featured on TD Jakes Show, GMA, Time, BuzzFeed). Stafford County Sheriff's Office since 2008; currently Lieutenant, Special Operations Division (patrol watch commander). Subject of the viral 'Dancing Deputy' video (Beyoncé 'Formation' at North Stafford HS pep rally), Oct 2016; auditioned on America's Got Talent Season 12, aired June 2017 (rejected by all four judges). Won the GW District BoS seat Nov 2023 as INDEPENDENT against incumbent Independent Tom Coen; 4-year term 1/1/2024-12/31/2027. Elected Chair Jan 7 2025 (1st term) and re-elected Chair Jan 7 2026 (2nd term, 5-2 with NO votes from Tinesha Allen + Crystal Vanuch). FIRST OPENLY GAY SUPERVISOR TO SERVE AS CHAIR OF STAFFORD BOS + first openly gay Stafford SO deputy (WJLA, WTVR, FXBG Free Press 6/4/2025). Stafford GOP currently lists him as a 'team member' on staffordgop.com despite his Independent ballot label — heterodox cross-coalition figure.
